reviews.name: places/ChIJhR3TGQSsPIgRzv0N1Vlg6Fo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSeFZTMW5SR3RTVlVvMU1UTmhZelZqY1VJMFpsRRAB
reviews.text: I've been an HRT patient here since mid-2024.  Never have I felt so abandoned. My doctor made a big change in my meds. I have had increasingly severe symptoms that will soon lead to a hospitalisation. I have reached out 5 times on MyChart, and after several days it showed someone had read it but didn't reply. I called twice, being told Nurse Triage would get back to me, first on Wed, then on Fri. I got no response, and now they are closed for the weekend. It has been a month of this. My prior sense of body dysphoria is back, and with it comes my eating disorder and unhealthy accompanying thoughts and actions. I have in that same month seen my therapists 8 times, and a psychiatrist twice, being told I need to get hold of the Endocrinologist to revert the recent med changes. I'm running out of options and time. I have dropped 10 pounds this week, and had two suicide attempts. I am surrounded by supports but there's only so much they can do. I am safe for now, but If I have done nothing else in this life it's to warn the trans folks reading this to stay far far away from this place if they need HRT. They use student doctors in residency, and my first doctor was amazing and supportive! Sadly, she graduated and I was resigned to a new resident. In the past year I've only talked to this second doctor twice. She has utterly failed as my doctor and as a human being.

reviews.name: places/ChIJhR3TGQSsPIgRzv0N1Vlg6Fo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYd2VtODNnRRAB
reviews.text: Medicine is so broken. DO NOT GO HERE! Being a type one diabetic things should be easy but they love to give the run around. They will cancel your appointment then you won’t be able to get in for months. Then they will not be able to fill your prescription because they have not seen you in months. They also make it very difficult getting supplies. I’ve been waiting weeks to get my CGM… I also asked if I could be switched to this awesome insulin pump I had no idea about but I have to come in for a whole other appointment for that even though I just saw the endocrinologist 2 weeks ago for a 5 minute appointment. The endocrinologist twice now has not looked in my chart and has congratulated me twice on my miscarriages…

reviews.name: places/ChIJexSDt_O3GYgRSZRNVT3VFEA/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRMGFDVUdREAE
reviews.text:
I’ve had the pleasure of working closely with Dr. Chris Coller as a practicing clinical nutritionist & health coach, and I can’t recommend him highly enough. Over the years, I’ve had the privilege of collaborating with him on many patient cases, and his expertise and care are unparalleled.

Dr. Coller’s comprehensive understanding of the body’s interconnected systems, combined with his evidence-based approach to treatment, truly sets him apart in the field. He doesn’t just address symptoms; he works diligently to identify the root causes of health issues, helping patients achieve lasting improvements by making realistic, sustainable changes.

What really sets Dr. Coller apart is his commitment to educating his patients. He never just prescribes treatment; he takes the time to explain the "why" behind his recommendations, ensuring that patients understand the reasoning behind each step. I've seen first hand how this empowers his patients to not only follow his advice but also to actively participate in their own healing journey.

Dr. Coller’s compassionate, patient-centered approach creates a space where individuals feel heard, understood, and supported. I’ve also seen firsthand how much he genuinely cares about his patients, and how dedicated he is to their long-term health and well-being.

If you’re looking for a knowledgeable, experienced, and compassionate physician who will guide you through your health journey with education, empathy, and realistic solutions, Dr. Coller is the one to see!

reviews.name: places/ChIJexSDt_O3GYgRSZRNVT3VFEA/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRNDlYdVZnEAE
reviews.text: I am immensely grateful for Dr. Coller’s functional/integrative health knowledge. I originally saw him as a patient after dealing with IBS for years; after following his recommendations, I experienced improvement in symptoms for the first time. reviews.text:
My experience with Low T, Dr Garcia has been fantastic in every way.
His expertise and his support staff are the best I’ve ever experienced in the medical world.
My low T levels were diagnosed 8 years ago. As a professional at a Fortune 500 company, my low T levels were causing extreme brain fog and a low energy level which created a difficult situation at work. After my general practitioner ran blood work, he recommended testosterone replacement which led me to Dr Garcia. Since that time all of my previous negative side effects have been improved. Other notable positive effects are: better overall physical strength and improved sex drive. Thank you Dr Garcia and Team.

reviews.name: places/ChIJu_IC_iLpIogRrCtlNsGOOew/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1MFBiSzV3RRAB
reviews.text:
I've been a patient of Dr. Garcia for about 8 years and I started with pellets but I'm now doing testosterone shots because it's easier to do even though it's a daily injection. I started hormone therapy after both my wife and I recognized that I was very moody, was experiencing a diminished sex drive, weight gain, and some depression. Now with hormone therapy I feel about 15 years younger and have so much more energy and better work-outs. The repeated blood work is necessary and I understand that it's important for monitoring my health.  It helps Dr. Garcia better understand my health changes and to determine whether my dosage should change or not.
I highly recommend Dr. Garcia.

After a GI check it was determined that I had some markers indicating a leaky gut and also some risk factors for developing ulcerative colitis.  I was offered Age Management’s GI repair program which I agreed to.  The detox and dietary changes lead to unbelievable results for me.  I have lost over 20 pounds on the program with the clean whole food diet the program defines.  Despite the dietary restrictions my energy is up rather than down.  Cutting the inflammatory foods from my diet has also lead to a significant reduction in pain.  Aaron has been great in guiding me through the entire program.  The weight loss and reduced pain have proven to be added benefits to the gastrointestinal repair I was in need of.  I am back to my high school weight and in or close to the best shape of my life.  The program has changed how I view food and what I am putting into my body.  If you are struggling with weight loss and/or pain I would highly recommend the program.  It has been life changing for me.

Eric W

reviews.text: Randy Flood, Amy Van Gunst and the Men’s Resource Center continually put my family at risk. The approach was cold, uninformed, victim-blaming and dangerous. I individually explained the past and they ignored obvious red flags. Despite convictions for domestic and gun violence and a prison sentence, Van Gunst, Flood and the staff ignored all of my exes past and current behavior and seemed to be charmed by his manipulation. MRC (also known at Fountain Hill Center) enabled our abuse. Even after exhibiting dangerous behavior they tried to dismiss my child’s first-hand experience and concerns. At one point after physical abuse had occurred Van Gunst tried to force my child to get on a plane even after disclosed physical abuse to MRC. Amy Van Gunst, MRC, FHC and RF are mandated reporters, they made no report and did not inform the court or judge. This practice allowed every parent coordination session for 7 years to be an opportunity for manipulation by my ex and to be transactional. They are not a safe nor responsible practitioner. We used them for 8 years.

reviews.text:
If you are using or considering an online service, you would be seriously mistaken to not at least give this place a chance.

I actually called Gameday first when I started looking locally but even though my research was saying they were reliable and trustworthy I was skeptical because they made it sound so easy to come in and get started and every other place had the same long drawn out process as the online places and had similar up front costs so I started assuming that was just how it was, like it was standardized or regulated to some extent.
It was initially a financial reason why I gave Gameday a chance because the others were going to be at least a couple hundred dollars or more and days of waiting before the 2nd required appointment.
Gameday does the blooddraw for no cost, in office. The results come back in what felt like 20min. Then you talk to someone that day and everything is ordered and shows up in DAYS NOT WEEKS.
If you haven't tried to do this type of treatment with any other company then you have no idea how much of a relief it feels like to walk in and walk out and know your stuff is on its way in a few days. IT IS SO MUCH BETTER.
The staff is extremely professional and friendly and responsive. I had a lot of questions up front and always got a person on the phone on my first attempt with no waiting or menu to go through on the phone. If looked around and there is really nothing even close to this place. This is how I should be. It's crazy to me that these other places are operating the way they are and getting away with it. Like I said... At least give them a chance... and at least with them you don't have to spend $200 or more just to start the conversation.

reviews.text:
I started my journey with Castle Rock Hormone Health after trying natural remedies with little success. HRT honestly scared me, but knowledge is power—and this team gives you all of it. Seven weeks later, I feel like a completely new person!

Ladies, stop normalizing feeling off—take your power back. The staff is fantastic, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring. Do yourself a favor—book a consultation. You won’t regret it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3_Nb-OqtJIgRLUobBp5IVC8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twdmVXZGxOVE10VmsxSllscEZUVFJVVlc5M04wRRAB
reviews.text:
I had been hesitant about starting hormone replacement therapy, but I knew I needed to learn more and get educated. My OB-GYN originally put me on the Combipatch to help with hot flashes, mood swings, and irritability. I hadn’t had a period for about a year and a half before starting the patch, and it worked well at first. But after some time, I suddenly started my period again—and it lasted for three weeks. When I reached out to my OB-GYN, I was told it would “pass.” After waiting another two weeks with no improvement, I asked to have my hormone levels checked but was told it wasn’t necessary. That’s when I decided to call Castle Rock.

I’m absolutely wowed by the level of care and service I’ve received there. They took the time to explain everything and discovered that my progesterone levels were low, which explained the bleeding. They started me on testosterone, estrogen cream, and progesterone, and I’m already feeling amazing, I sleep in heavenly peace! The best part is how responsive and supportive the team is—if I have any questions, I can reach someone right away. I’m so excited to see how I continue to feel over the next few months!

I was skeptical too at first but they are SO thorough in the lab work and Emily really knows how to dose HRT. I feel confident in about 6mos to a year I’ll be feeling like myself again. I’m thankful this place is available and the owners work really hard to make it affordable for everyone. Bio HRT isn’t cheap no matter what state you in, but you will get outstanding 1:1 care at CRHH clinic!

reviews.text: Wonderful, well managed medical facility offering hope when other treatment options have failed, with cutting edge procedures and the technology to support them.  Staff is friendly, courteous and well trained.  Calls are returned promptly.  My physician, Dr. Farhat was so professional and confidence inspiring,  yet completely warm and personable with a great bedside manner.  And my result from the PRP treatment.... better than I ever hoped for.   I had total resolution of crippling foot pain that had plagued me for many, many months and was literally ruining my life.  I couldn't be more grateful, and the out of pocket expense (how inexplicable that Medicare won't cover a nonsurgical treatment that is so effective) is the best money I ever spent.  So happy!

reviews.name: places/ChIJtXcSbtfpJIgRCjvSDIM0g54/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tJM1owZGZlbmQ0VFdkaFIxQldTM1ZqV0ZFNE5XYxAB
reviews.text:
I had a procedure done here over a year ago and have had no results from it. It was for spine issues, where bone marrow stem cells and PRP were injected into the lumbar area. It cost me $9500. I knew going into it that regenerative medicine is a gamble, so I can't fault this clinic for that. The reasons I am leaving it as 2 stars are: 1) I felt I was mislead about the likelihood of success from this procedure; 2) the front end staff was rude to my family during the treatment; 3) Other than a phone call 4 weeks post-procedure, the only aftercare has been a series of surveys sent through text messaging.

I don't doubt that this clinic is helping people, but I wasn't one of them.

* I had a follow up MRI done today. This is 13 months after I had my procedure done at MCRM. There is no change on these scans from my MRI before bone marrow stem cells.

reviews.name: places/ChIJy5uMWyHFJIgR1giWfpG4Xf8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGUk5YRkxUR2RNU2xWdlFqSk5NMU5rV1RoS2EzYxAB
reviews.text:
Gameday Men’s Health — Where Needle Anxiety Goes to Die 💉💪

I used to hate needles. Like, “look away and pretend I’m somewhere else” levels of hate. Yet somehow Gameday Men’s Health in Troy convinced me to voluntarily show up and get poked on a regular schedule… and I keep coming back smiling because the results show up in the gym and the bedroom.

The process is ridiculously easy. Transparent pricing, quick appointments, and a staff that’s genuinely kind and welcoming. No weird upsells, no confusing medical jargon — just straight answers and a smooth process from start to finish.

Appointments are so fast I spend more time driving there than actually being inside. Walk in, get taken care of, walk out feeling like you just upgraded your biology a little bit.

If you’re nervous about TRT, clinics, or needles in general, this place makes it about as painless as humanly possible.

5/5 — came in afraid of needles, left chasing PRs at the gym.

reviews.name: places/ChIJy5uMWyHFJIgR1giWfpG4Xf8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCcFkwTmpMV1Z6ZDNCWllWOW1UVnBUY2tOclVWRRAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Gameday. I’ve been getting my TRT and peptide therapy through them, and it’s made a huge difference in how I feel day to day. My energy, focus, and drive are back, my workouts and recovery have improved, and overall I just feel stronger, healthier, and more balanced.

The team at Gameday takes the time to listen, explain everything clearly, and make sure your treatment is dialed in perfectly for you. Josh, the owner, was incredibly kind and accommodating. You can tell he genuinely cares about helping people feel their best. You never feel rushed or like just another client.

If you’ve been considering getting your hormones checked or exploring peptide therapy, I’d 100% recommend Gameday. It’s easily one of the best decisions I’ve made for my health and wellness.

reviews.text: I have been seeing Dr. Berke for a few years now and she is the only physician that actually listen to me and addressed my symptoms. My symptoms took us down a path that addressed issues that I was shocked to learn about. Now that I finally have a diagnosis my disease that I didn’t know anything about can be addressed head on. Dr. Berke NEVER gave up on me and continued to dive into test after test to get to the root cause. She is such a sweet person who will treat you with respect and besides listening to you she has no problem addressing your questions even if it’s about a treatment that you have researched but she isn’t doing. She will explain why she doesn’t believe that that treatment is optimal for you and then she will let you know if that is what you really want she will do it. I went with her treatment plan because I trust her over my own research because she has a lot of test data on me and she has a mentor who she consults with. Two brains are better than one and I love that she has someone else to review her tough cases with!
